name: A11y Agent Team MCP Server
description: Accessibility scanning and remediation tools for WCAG 2.2 compliance with experimental WCAG 3.0 support. Provides 40+ tools for checking contrast (WCAG 2.x and APCA), headings, links, forms, document metadata, Office/PDF/EPUB scanning, markdown linting, Playwright-based browser testing, veraPDF SARIF output, color blindness simulation, reading level analysis, caption validation, accessibility statement generation, audit persistence with trend tracking, and scan configuration.

tools.name: check_contrast
tools.description: Calculate WCAG 2.x contrast ratio between two hex colors

tools.name: check_apca_contrast
tools.description: Calculate APCA Lightness Contrast (WCAG 3.0 draft) between text and background colors

tools.name: check_color_blindness
tools.description: Simulate color blindness types and check distinguishability

tools.name: check_reading_level
tools.description: Analyze text readability using Flesch-Kincaid and other metrics

tools.name: get_accessibility_guidelines
tools.description: Get accessibility guidelines for a specific component type

tools.name: check_heading_structure
tools.description: Analyze heading structure for hierarchy and skip issues

tools.name: check_link_text
tools.description: Detect ambiguous link text patterns

tools.name: check_form_labels
tools.description: Check form inputs for accessible labels and structure

tools.name: validate_caption_file
tools.description: Validate WebVTT or SRT caption files for timing, overlap, and quality

tools.name: generate_accessibility_statement
tools.description: Generate W3C or EU model accessibility statements from audit data

tools.name: scan_office_document
tools.description: Scan .docx, .xlsx, or .pptx for accessibility issues

tools.name: scan_pdf_document
tools.description: Scan PDF files for accessibility issues

tools.name: extract_document_metadata
tools.description: Extract metadata from Office documents

tools.name: batch_scan_documents
tools.description: Scan multiple documents in a directory

tools.name: fix_document_metadata
tools.description: Fix title, language, or author in Office document metadata

tools.name: fix_document_headings
tools.description: Analyze and report heading structure issues in .docx files

tools.name: check_audit_cache
tools.description: Check .a11y-cache.json for changed, new, and unchanged files

tools.name: update_audit_cache
tools.description: Write scan results to .a11y-cache.json

tools.name: run_axe_scan
tools.description: Run axe-core accessibility scan on a URL

tools.name: run_playwright_a11y_tree
tools.description: Get accessibility tree from a web page

tools.name: run_playwright_keyboard_scan
tools.description: Test keyboard navigation on a web page

tools.name: run_playwright_contrast_scan
tools.description: Scan page for contrast issues using Playwright

tools.name: run_playwright_viewport_scan
tools.description: Test responsive layout accessibility

tools.name: run_verapdf_scan
tools.description: Run veraPDF validation on a PDF

tools.name: run_verapdf_sarif
tools.description: Run veraPDF and output findings as SARIF

tools.name: check_verapdf_installation
tools.description: Check and guide veraPDF CLI installation

tools.name: convert_pdf_form_to_html
tools.description: Convert PDF form fields for accessibility

tools.name: scan_epub
tools.description: Scan ePub files for accessibility issues (EPUB Accessibility 1.1)

tools.name: scan_epub_reading_order
tools.description: Validate ePub spine reading order against TOC

tools.name: check_epub_metadata
tools.description: Check ePub accessibility metadata (schema.org)

tools.name: scan_markdown
tools.description: Scan markdown files for accessibility issues

tools.name: scan_markdown_links
tools.description: Check markdown links for ambiguous text and broken anchors

tools.name: save_audit_result
tools.description: Save an audit result to the .a11y-history directory for trend tracking

tools.name: list_audit_history
tools.description: List stored audit results with filtering by type, target, and date range

tools.name: get_audit_result
tools.description: Retrieve a specific stored audit result by ID

tools.name: prune_audit_history
tools.description: Delete audit history entries older than a specified number of days

tools.name: get_audit_trend
tools.description: Compute score progression and issue velocity for a target from audit history

prompts.name: audit-page
prompts.description: Structured WCAG audit prompt with tool sequence and severity scoring

prompts.name: check-component
prompts.description: Component-specific accessibility review using built-in guidelines

prompts.name: explain-wcag
prompts.description: Explain a WCAG success criterion with examples and testing guidance

resources.description: Component accessibility guidelines (button, form, modal, table, navigation, image, heading, link, list)
Auto-generated list of all registered accessibility tools
Aggregate accessibility dashboard with per-target trends, score progression, and issue velocity
